title: valeriana bractescens
intro: Valeriana bractescens, also known as fragrant valerian or fragrant valerian root, is a perennial plant in the family Valerianaceae, native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its sedative and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to its high content of valepotriates and isovaleric acid. The health benefits of Valeriana bractescens include improved sleep quality, reduced anxiety and stress, and relief from symptoms of menopause and restlessness. Valeriana bractescens can be prepared as an herbal remedy in various forms, including teas, tinctures, capsules, and topical creams.
